---
title: "St. John\'s College, Auckland"
---

## St. John\'s College, Auckland

**Type:** organization

### About

Founded as a school and theological college by the Rt. Rev. George Augustus Selwyn, Bishop of New Zealand, in 1844.  The website of the theological college is www.stjohnscollege.ac.nz.  A picture of the buildings in 1862 drawn by Caroline Abraham iand now in the Alexander Turnbull Library is available at  http://www.teara.govt.nz/en/auckland-places/13/4

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
